sections.overview: The scheme was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttarakhand to provide opportunities for government employees to participate in All-India level sports competitions organized by the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions.
sections.objective: To enable personnel from various government departments in Uttarakhand to participate annually in national-level sports competitions and promote sports engagement among government employees.
eligibility: Applicant must be an employee of a government department in Uttarakhand
benefits: Other necessary support as per departmental standards
applicationprocess: Selection trials are conducted at district level
Selection trials are conducted at state level
Selected players qualify to participate in All-India competition

faq.question: Who is eligible to participate in the scheme?
faq.answer: Any employee of a government department in Uttarakhand is eligible.

faq.question: How are players selected for the competition?
faq.answer: Players are selected through trials conducted at district and state levels.

faq.question: What types of support are provided to selected participants?
faq.answer: Participants receive travel, accommodation, food allowances, and sports kits as per departmental standards.

faq.question: How often is the competition held?
faq.answer: The competition is held annually at the All-India level.

faq.question: How many personnel benefit each year?
faq.answer: Approximately 150 personnel benefit from the scheme annually.

faq.question: At what levels are selection trials conducted?
faq.answer: Selection trials are conducted at both district and state levels.

faq.question: Can employees from all government departments participate?
faq.answer: Yes, employees from all state government departments in Uttarakhand are eligible.
